neighbors.name: Mack Real Estate Group
neighbors.claims: Parcels 204-09-008A and 204-09-008B are located at the northeast corner of Loop 303 and N 51st Ave and belong to the Halo Vista development ([source](https://www.costar.com/article/767572006/costco-marriott-join-real-estate-project-surrounding-tsmc-microchip-plant-in-arizona)). Mack Real Estate Group and McCourt Partners acquired the 2,300-acre site at an Arizona State Land Department auction in May 2024 to build a multi-billion dollar mixed-use hub surrounding the TSMC semiconductor plant ([source](https://www.costar.com/article/1448747740/sale-acquistion-of-the-year-for-phoenix-22)). As a major real estate firm, they are actively planning up to 30 million square feet of commercial space, industrial facilities, and residential units ([source](https://www.costar.com/article/767572006/costco-marriott-join-real-estate-project-surrounding-tsmc-microchip-plant-in-arizona)).
neighbors.influence_justification: Developing multi-billion dollar Halo Vista project around TSMC

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage as a peer commercial developer. Coordinate strictly on infrastructure, zoning, and complementary land uses, recognizing their massive investment and high influence with Phoenix economic development officials.
